common.title: Maetry
common.description: Salon management software and beauty booking marketplace

booking.metaDescription: Book a beauty appointment with a Maetry salon in just a few steps
booking.headline: Online booking
booking.subtitle: Choose a service, a specialist and a time that works for you
booking.serviceHint: Browse the salon service menu without signing in.
booking.timeHint: Time is shown in the salon time zone.
booking.timeEmptyHint: Try another day or choose a different service.
booking.detailsHint: The salon will use your phone number only to confirm the appointment.
booking.fieldNamePlaceholder: What should the salon call you?
booking.fieldPhoneHelper: Your number is used only to confirm the booking.
booking.serviceEmptyTitle: No services are available right now
booking.serviceEmptyHint: This booking link is active, but the salon has not published bookable services yet.
booking.masterNotRequired: The salon will assign the right specialist if needed.
booking.summaryTotalFooter: Price does not include taxes and fees.
booking.successBookingHint: The booking is created. We are loading the final confirmation details.
booking.successSubtitle: Add the appointment to your wallet so the details stay close at hand.
booking.successManageTitle: Get the app to manage your booking
booking.successManageSubtitle: Keep the appointment close and make changes without a call.
booking.successManageBulletReminders: Reminders so you don't miss it
booking.successManageBulletBookings: All your bookings in one place
booking.successAppleWalletCaption: Your booking is saved here — you won't lose it.

errors.loadSlots: We couldn't find available times for this service.

errors.validationSlot: Choose an available time slot before continuing.

loading.salon: Loading salon details and service catalog...

warnings.partialSalonData: Some salon details are temporarily unavailable. Booking can still continue with the data we already have.
warnings.missingPublicSalonContract: Some salon endpoints still behave like authorized customer endpoints. The UI keeps the public flow running where possible, but backend public access still needs to be fixed.

paywall.metaDescription: Choose a salon plan, review seat pricing and continue to billing from the Maetry client app surface.
paywall.invalidSessionMessage: This billing page requires a secure Maetry Console session. Open billing from the latest app version.
paywall.unavailableMessage: Maetry could not load the current billing data for this salon.
paywall.sessionExpiredMessage: Your secure billing link or token is no longer valid. This is usually not an API failure — open billing again from the latest Maetry Console.
paywall.title: Billing & payments
paywall.subtitle: Choose a plan and continue to secure web checkout in the same billing session. Active seats stay synced from the server.
paywall.subtitleWithSalon: Choose the live plan for {salonName} and continue to secure web checkout with the same billing session used by Maetry Console.
paywall.plansDescription: Selectable plan cards mirror the Console paywall, while pricing still comes from the shared billing catalog and seat summary.
paywall.freePlanTerms: 30 created bookings are included. Upgrade when you need to accept or create more.
paywall.customBillingTerms: Custom billing terms apply outside self-serve checkout.
paywall.changePlanFailed: Failed to update the current billing plan.
paywall.secureCheckoutHint: Payment opens in Stripe Checkout for this salon. Subscription management stays on the web, outside the app.
paywall.securePlanChangeHint: Plan changes stay inside the same secure billing session for this salon and apply on the web.
paywall.secureScheduledChangeHint: This change stays in the same secure billing session and is scheduled on the web for the next renewal.
paywall.contactSalesHint: This plan is handled outside self-serve checkout. Reach out to Maetry sales for a custom billing setup.
paywall.manageSubscriptionHint: Open the hosted Stripe portal to update payment details or manage the live subscription.
paywall.billingConsentDescription: Review the billing terms before starting checkout or changing the current plan.
paywall.billingConsentLabel: I agree to the Terms and Conditions and Billing Addendum.
paywall.billingLegalPrefix: By continuing, you agree to the
paywall.firstPurchaseHint: Start a paid subscription by opening Stripe Checkout for this salon.
paywall.upgradePlanHint: This change upgrades the current plan in the same billing session.
paywall.downgradePlanHint: This change is scheduled for the next renewal.
paywall.freePlanHint: The free plan is applied automatically and does not use checkout.
paywall.planUpdated: Billing plan updated for this salon.
paywall.planChangeScheduled: Plan change scheduled for the next renewal.

hero.subtitle: one ecosystem for salon operations and client booking
hero.description: Maetry helps salons manage bookings and helps clients discover and book beauty services.

about.title: Tools for salon operations and client booking, built in one ecosystem
about.description: Maetry gives salon teams a cleaner way to run bookings, schedules and client communication while giving clients a simpler path to discover and book services.

julia.name: Julia
julia.text: Maetry gives me a clear view of bookings, repeat clients and the daily workload. The salon feels easier to manage because the information is finally in one place.

nikita.name: Nikita
nikita.text: Online booking through Maetry removes friction for clients and brings in demand without constant manual coordination.

sofia.name: Sofia
sofia.text: We track feedback and daily performance inside one workflow, which helps the team keep service quality high.

irina.name: Irina
irina.text: I spend less time piecing numbers together and more time deciding which services deserve attention and how to grow revenue.

features.subtitle: platform overview
features.title: Core tools for booking, team coordination and client communication

management.title: Schedule management
management.description: Set working hours, avoid overlaps and keep every specialist's availability up to date.

notifications.title: Client reminders
notifications.description: Reduce no-shows with automatic reminders and more consistent communication.

onlineBooking.title: Online booking
onlineBooking.description: Let clients book without calling and give the team more time for service instead of manual confirmations.

pricing.subtitle: pricing
pricing.title: Simple pricing that grows with the team
pricing.description: Start with a clear base plan, then estimate the monthly total as your team expands.

calculator.title: How many team members do you have?
calculator.note: The estimate assumes the base price includes one team member.

q1.question: What can salon teams manage in Maetry?
q1.answer: Maetry supports online booking, schedules, reminders, client history and day-to-day salon operations in one place.

q2.question: Can I work in another salon and manage my own?
q2.answer: Yes. If your account has access to multiple workspaces, you can switch between them.

q3.question: How do I invite a team member?
q3.answer: Open the salon workspace, create an invitation and send the link to the employee.

q4.question: Can I create a booking for a client who does not use the app?
q4.answer: Yes. Create the appointment without selecting an existing client first, then share the generated link if needed.

q5.question: Can I share a booking link on social media?
q5.answer: Yes. Salons can use booking links in social media, messengers and other client touchpoints.

prefooter.title: Sign in
prefooter.subtitle: Start running your salon with less manual work
prefooter.description: We help teams onboard quickly, migrate essential data and set up the service around real salon workflows.

ambassador.title: Bring salons to Maetry and earn recurring partner revenue
ambassador.subtitle: For consultants, agencies and industry partners who already work with salon owners. Refer salons to Maetry and earn 50% of subscription payments during the first 6 months.
ambassador.aboutDescription: Maetry helps salons centralize bookings, schedules, client history and reminders. Use the points below to explain the operational value clearly.
ambassador.readyToPartner: Work with Maetry as a partner
ambassador.partnerDescription: If you already advise, market to or onboard salon owners, send us a request. We will reply with terms, materials and the referral workflow.
ambassador.offerValue: 50% of subscription revenue during the first 6 months for every referred salon
ambassador.benefit1Value: A practical system for bookings, schedules, reminders and smoother team coordination
ambassador.benefit2Value: Clear economics and recurring revenue from active referred salons
ambassador.ctaNote: Tell us how you work with salons and we will send the next steps.

email.subject: I want to join the Maetry partner program
email.body: Hello! I work with salon owners and would like to join the Maetry partner program. Please send me the partnership terms and next steps.

ambassador.gridDescription: Each module turns a salon pain point into a concrete Maetry outcome you can use in outreach, audits and demos.
ambassador.gridHint: Use these points in partner conversations with salon owners and managers

appointments.title: Bookings
problems: Appointments live in notebooks, chats or personal calendars
Free time is hard to see at a glance
Administrators spend too much time distributing bookings

schedule.title: Work schedules
problems: Clients call to ask who is working
Shift changes create confusion
Manual schedule updates take too much time

services.title: Service catalog
problems: The service list lives in memory or notes
Prices and responsible specialists are unclear
Clients arrive unprepared
solutions: Custom pricing and descriptions by specialist

clients.title: Client base
problems: Client history is not stored in one place
It is hard to spot inactive clients
Contacts depend on memory or personal phones
solutions: Add clients manually or through invitations
Keep visit and service history in one profile
benefits: Stronger base for outreach and marketing

employees.title: Team management
problems: Limited visibility into specialist workload
Roles and pay structure are not transparent
Access is hard to manage
solutions: Client and booking tracking by specialist

salon.title: Salon profile
problems: Clients struggle to find contacts or location
Salon information lives in different places
New clients have no clear discovery path
solutions: Salon profile with brand, contacts and description
benefits: More visibility for new client acquisition

attraction.title: Client acquisition
problems: It is hard to turn social traffic into bookings
Calling the salon is inconvenient for many clients
solutions: Booking links for social profiles and websites

workspaces.title: Multiple locations
problems: Specialists work across locations and lose track of appointments
Owners switch between disconnected systems
solutions: Switch between salons from one account

support.title: Support and onboarding
problems: Teams worry about switching systems
Nobody wants to hunt for instructions
New staff need help ramping up

heading.employeeInvite: You have been invited to join a salon team
heading.clientInvite: You have been invited to book with a salon
heading.default: You have been invited to Maetry

subheading.employeeInvite: Open Maetry to manage your schedule and client flow
subheading.clientInvite: Open Maetry to view the salon and book online
subheading.default: Download the Maetry app to continue

invite.downloadDescription: Install the app, sign in and reopen the link to accept the invitation.

linkHandler.pleaseWait: Please wait while we open the right page
linkHandler.errorTitle: This link could not be opened
linkHandler.errorCampaign: We couldn't load the invitation or campaign data.
linkHandler.errorUnknownType: This link type is not supported.

hero.title: Help for booking issues, account access and salon-side operations.
hero.subtitle: Use one support entry point for client questions, salon workflows, billing and technical issues. We review requests daily and route them to the right owner.
hero.responseBody: We review all requests daily and reply as quickly as possible from the right support queue.
hero.urgentBody: For same-day booking problems or appointment changes, contact the salon directly as well.

cardPoints.one: Use the email tied to the affected account or booking when possible.
cardPoints.two: Include the salon name, date and screenshots if something failed on the web or in the app.
cardPoints.three: Do not send passwords or full card numbers through support.

client.title: I'm a client
client.description: Booking confirmations, appointment changes, account recovery and app issues.

salon.title: I'm a salon or team member
salon.description: Console access, billing, staff workflows, booking operations and business-side issues.

roleSection.title: Start with the role closest to your issue.
roleSection.body: The page stays unified, but the request is structured differently for clients and salon teams so support does not waste time on back-and-forth.

quickActions.title: Most requests start in one of three buckets.
quickActions.body: Pick the closest category now. You can still change the exact issue type inside the form.

selfServe.emailBody: Use support@maetry.com if you prefer a direct inbox route.
selfServe.appBody: Open the latest Maetry app before reporting account or booking issues.
selfServe.telegramBody: Use Telegram if that is already your active communication channel with Maetry.

prepare.title: What to have ready before you submit
items: Account email or phone tied to the affected booking or workspace
Salon name and booking date/time when the request is appointment-related
Screenshots or a short screen recording of the problem
Booking reference, payment date or invoice details if billing is involved

warning.title: Sensitive information
warning.body: Do not include passwords, full card numbers or any private data you would not send in email. Use the account email tied to the issue whenever possible so support can verify the request faster.

form.title: Send a structured request
form.intro: Current selection: {issueType}. We use the details below to route your request without an extra clarification step.

fields.issueType: What do you need help with?
fields.subject: Subject
fields.consent: Maetry may use these details to follow up on this request and confirm account or booking context.

placeholders.subject: Short summary of the issue
placeholders.description: Explain what happened, what you expected and what is blocking you now.
placeholders.bookingReference: Booking ID, deep link or confirmation URL
placeholders.productOrPlan: Plan name, seat package or invoice context
placeholders.reproductionSteps: List the steps that lead to the issue.
placeholders.privacyDetails: Anything else legal or privacy support should know.

hints.phone: Optional, but helpful if support needs a quicker follow-up.

attachments.hint: Images, short videos or PDFs. Up to 4 files.
attachments.types: Accepted formats: images, short screen recordings and PDF receipts.
attachments.maxCount: You can attach up to 4 files.
attachments.maxSize: Each attachment must be under 20 MB.

form.partnershipHint: Partnership and sales requests still use the same support intake here. Include company context, market and the kind of partnership you want to discuss.

errors.consent: Please confirm that Maetry can follow up on this request.
errors.submit: We couldn't prepare the request right now. You can still email support directly.

faq.title: Questions support pages usually need to answer up front
faq.body: This is not a full help center yet. It is the minimum self-serve layer that reduces avoidable back-and-forth before human support steps in.

items.question: I need help with a booking
items.answer: Choose Booking in the form and include the salon name, appointment date and any booking link or confirmation details you have.

items.question: I didn't receive a confirmation
items.answer: Include the booking date and salon name, then attach a screenshot of the last step you saw in the app or on the web.

items.question: I need to change my account email or phone
items.answer: Choose Account access and submit the email currently tied to the affected Maetry account.

items.question: I'm a salon and need console help
items.answer: Choose Account access or Technical issue depending on whether the problem is login-related or workflow-related inside the console.

items.question: I have a billing question
items.answer: Choose Billing and include the plan or product plus the invoice or charge date if you have it.

items.question: I want to report a bug
items.answer: Choose Technical issue, specify platform and severity, and list the exact steps needed to reproduce the problem.

success.submittedTitle: Your support request is in the queue.
success.submittedBody: We’ll reply to {email} as soon as the right team reviews it.
success.mailtoTitle: Your support email draft is ready.
success.mailtoBody: We prepared the email for {email}. Review it in your mail app and send it to finish the request.
success.nextReply: Support will reply by email after reviewing the request details.
success.nextMailto: Open the drafted email, then send it so the request actually reaches support.
success.attachmentsHint: {count, plural, one {You selected 1 file. It will not be attached automatically to the email draft, so add it manually before sending.} other {You selected # files. They will not be attached automatically to the email draft, so add them manually before sending.}}
success.truncatedHint: If the description in your email draft looks shortened, add the remaining context before sending.
success.urgent: For urgent same-day appointment issues, contact the salon directly too.
